notes: Uses The Tube TV Mode VCR overlay for regular The Tube local media and NZB stream playback.
Shows server playback details in The Tube overlay, including direct play, transcode profile, hardware engine, codec, status, and transfer rate when available.
Adds a The Tube playback overlay mode so normal playback keeps seek/menu controls instead of live channel controls.
Keeps The Tube volume overlay and playback menu from overlapping.
